/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/AddressParser.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/PreProcessor.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/RuleEngine.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/ConfidenceScorer.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/CacheManager.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/services/MetricsCollector.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/controllers/ParseController.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/controllers/BatchController.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/controllers/HealthController.cc.o CMakeFiles/address-service.dir/src/controllers/MetricsController.cc.o -o address-service  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a -lpostal -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread
